name: @maimorylab/agentmemory-lab
description: Persistent memory for AI coding agents, powered by iii-engine's three primitives

scripts.build: tsdown && (cp iii-config.yaml dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp iii-config.docker.yaml dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp docker-compose.yml dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp .env.example dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && mkdir -p dist/viewer/agent-avatars dist/viewer/demo dist/functions && cp src/viewer/index.html dist/viewer/ && cp src/viewer/favicon.svg dist/viewer/ && cp src/viewer/agent-avatars/* dist/viewer/agent-avatars/ && cp src/viewer/demo/* dist/viewer/demo/ && cp src/functions/todo-extract-langextract.py dist/functions/
scripts.check:browser-extension: node scripts/check-browser-extension.mjs && node scripts/check-browser-extension-site-config-sync.mjs && node scripts/check-browser-extension-review-draft.mjs && node scripts/check-browser-extension-memory-drafts.mjs && node scripts/check-browser-extension-diagnostics-privacy.mjs && node scripts/check-browser-extension-fixtures.mjs && node scripts/check-browser-extension-demo-interaction.mjs
scripts.package:browser-extension: npm run check:browser-extension && node scripts/package-browser-extension.mjs && npm run check:browser-extension-package && npm run check:ai-validation-evidence && node scripts/write-delivery-summary.mjs && npm run make:ai-validation-tester-pack
scripts.check:delivery: npm run build && npm run check:maimorylab-branding && node scripts/check-delivery.mjs
scripts.pre-pr: npm run check:consistency-local && npm run build && npm test

author: MaimoryLab
